author: ivanlitteri
content: Hey! I'll be doing some local testing with ethrex x (lighthouse + prysm) for 8025. I think I have the correct kurtosis config for lighthouse here https://github.com/eth-act/lighthouse/blob/feat/eip8025/scripts/local_testnet/network_params_eip8025_zkboost.yaml, but I couldn't find prysm's

author: chotuchaiwala
content:
you can find more examples here: https://github.com/ethpandaops/ethereum-package/tree/main/.github/tests/examples

there's one with prysm as well: https://github.com/ethpandaops/ethereum-package/blob/main/.github/tests/examples/8gpu_zkvm.yaml

but some of these use older versions(across the whole zk stack) as development is going on fast and compatibility might not be the best.

prysm branch: https://github.com/OffchainLabs/prysm/tree/optional-proofs
there's a gloas optional proof branch too

images:
https://hub.docker.com/r/ethpandaops/prysm-beacon-chain/tags?name=optional-proofs
